description: DayPage v8 — 美术馆美学体验改版。源: tasks/prd-daypage-v8-museum-aesthetic.md。把 DayPage 重做为「日式美术馆 + iOS 26 灵动岛」气质：内容优先 / hairline 留白 / 仪式感反馈。覆盖 6 个核心屏（Today / Memo Detail / Drawer 热力图 / Composer Pill / Recording Sheet + 灵动岛 / Share Card）+ 设计系统底座。iOS Native 主线，Web 跟进（仅换 UI 不动数据层）。33 个 user story 按 Wave A→F 依赖排序。环境前提：本地 dev 需 `npm run dev` + `npm run dev:inngest` 同跑；新增 endpoints 见 PRD §8；不引入手势库 / 不动 schema 主结构（仅 jsonb settings + 7 endpoints）。

userStories.title: 建立统一 design-tokens 文件 + 双端生成器
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single source of truth for all design tokens so iOS and Web stay visually aligned.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 design-tokens/tokens.json (完整 schema 见 PRD §23)
新建 design-tokens/generators/to-css.ts → 派生 web/src/app/globals.css :root 段
新建 design-tokens/generators/to-swift.ts → 派生 DayPage/App/DSTokens.swift
颜色 token 名称与 PRD §6.2 完全一致 (bg-warm/surface-white/surface-sunken/fg-primary/muted/subtle/accent/accent-hover/soft/border/heatmap-empty/low/mid/high/border-subtle/default)
字体 token 包含 font-display/serif/body/mono/handwrite (Fraunces 与 Caveat 字体文件下载到 DayPage/App/Resources/Fonts/ 并在 Info.plist 注册)
圆角 token: radius-small=8 / card=14 / hero=18 / sheet=28 / recording=34 / island=24 / pill=999
动画 token: motion-spring='cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1)' / fast=220 / medium=280 / slow=320 / island=360
添加 npm run tokens:build script 与 make tokens-build target
CI 加 tokens:check step (跑生成器后比对 diff，有 diff 则 fail)
Typecheck passes
Web 构建通过 (cd web && npm run build)
iOS 构建通过 (xcodebuild -scheme DayPage build)

userStories.title: 扩展全局动画 keyframes 库 + reduce-motion 退化
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a unified keyframes library so all animations are consistent and respect accessibility preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: web/src/app/globals.css 注册全部 keyframes: pulse-dot / breathe / shimmer-bar / sheet-up / sheet-left / fade-in / caret / scale-in (已存在的不重复)
暴露 .fade-in / .scale-in / .shimmer utility class
所有 keyframes wrap @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) → animation-duration: 0.01ms + animation-iteration-count: 1
iOS 新建 DayPage/App/DSMotion.swift 暴露 Animation.dsSpring / dsEaseOut / dsSheet 常量
iOS 端检查 @Environment(\.accessibilityReduceMotion) 自动退化到 .linear(duration: 0.01)
Typecheck passes
Web 构建通过
iOS 构建通过

userStories.title: GlassPillBtn 组件 (Web + iOS)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable glassmorphism pill button used in all top bars (back/share/search/settings).
acceptanceCriteria: Web: web/src/components/ui/GlassPillBtn.tsx，props: dark?: boolean / size?: 'sm' | 'md' / onClick / children / aria-label (必填) / disabled?: boolean
iOS: DayPage/App/Components/DSGlassPill.swift，对应参数 + accessibilityLabel

视觉规格: height=40 / min-width=40 / padding=0 12 / radius=999 / background=rgba(255,255,255,0.78) (dark 时 rgba(30,28,24,0.62)) / backdrop-filter=blur(20px) saturate(160%) / box-shadow='0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), inset 0 0.5px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6)'
size=sm: height=36 + 触控扩展到 44 via ::before pseudo (Web) / .contentShape(.rect) (iOS)
Tap 反馈: scale 0.96 + opacity 0.85, 220ms; prefers-reduced-motion 时仅改 opacity
focus-visible: outline 2px solid var(--accent) / outline-offset 2px
disabled: opacity 0.4 / cursor not-allowed / pointer-events none
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: SectionLabel + Dot 原子组件 (Web + iOS)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need atomic mono-caps section label and decorative dot components used throughout the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Web: <SectionLabel right?> 渲染 font-size:11 / letter-spacing:1.6 / text-transform:uppercase / font-weight:700 / color:var(--fg-muted)
Web: <Dot opacity?> 渲染 3×3 圆点，默认 opacity 0.45
iOS: DSSectionLabel + DSDot View
<SectionLabel> 使用 <h2 role="heading" aria-level="2">（朗读为常规标题，去掉装饰 letter-spacing）
<Dot> 加 aria-hidden / .accessibilityHidden(true)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Today 顶部 utility bar (glass scroll-aware)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a frosted-glass top bar that fades in only when I scroll so it doesn't intrude when idle.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 web/src/app/(app)/today/page.tsx 与 iOS DayPage/Features/Today/TodayView.swift (替换或与 Legacy 并存)
容器 position:absolute / top:0 / paddingTop:60 / paddingLeft:14 / paddingRight:14 / paddingBottom:10
scrollTop > 8 时: background=rgba(250,248,246,0.78) + backdrop-filter=blur(20px) saturate(150%) + bottom 0.5px solid var(--border-subtle)
scrollTop ≤ 8 时: 背景透明 / 无边框
切换过渡 transition:background 200ms ease-out, backdrop-filter 200ms ease-out
三个 GlassPillBtn: hamburger (aria-label='打开侧边栏') / 搜索 (aria-label='搜索') / 设置 (aria-label='设置')
scrollY 监听 passive:true + rAF throttle
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Today Hero 标题块 + /api/today/header endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a big serif weekday hero with mono meta line so opening the app feels intentional.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 GET /api/today/header endpoint, 返回 {weekday, weekday_zh, date_iso, date_display, memo_count, weather:{temp,condition,icon}, location}
H1: font-size:56 / line-height:1 / letter-spacing:-0.8 / font-family:var(--font-serif) / font-weight:600
H1 渲染本地化周几: Intl.DateTimeFormat('zh-CN', { weekday: 'long' })
Meta 行: font-family:mono / font-size:11 / letter-spacing:1.2 / uppercase / color:var(--fg-muted) / margin-top:12 / gap:8
<Dot/> 分隔; NOTES 计数着 var(--accent) 色
28° 前内联 sun SVG icon 11×11
加载态: skeleton mono caps 'LOADING…'; 错误态: fallback 'MAY 28 · — · — · —'
endpoint 5min cache (weather invalidation key)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Today Segmented Control (今日/成稿/档案)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a pill segmented control to switch between today / page / archive views.
acceptanceCriteria: 容器: inline-flex / padding:3 / radius:999 / background:var(--surface-sunken) / border:0.5px solid var(--border-subtle)
选中 segment: background:var(--surface-white) / color:var(--accent) / font-weight:600 / box-shadow:'0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'
未选中: background:transparent / color:var(--fg-muted) / font-weight:500
URL 同步 ?tab=today|page|archive 用 useSearchParams + router.replace（不污染历史栈）
键盘可达: role='tablist' + 子 role='tab' + aria-selected + Arrow Left/Right 切换
切换动画: 选中 indicator 用 transform:translateX(...) 280ms spring 滑动
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: AI Summary 卡 + /api/today/ai-summary endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a quiet white card with a serif italic AI summary that types in like a literary opening.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 GET /api/today/ai-summary endpoint, 返回 {summary, generated_at, is_stale, memo_count_at_generation} 或 404 {summary:null}
容器: radius:18 / padding:18 20 20 22 / background:var(--surface-white) / border:0.5px solid var(--border-subtle) / box-shadow:var(--shadow-card)
左侧 rail: position:absolute / left:0 / top:14 / bottom:14 / width:2 / radius:999 / background:var(--accent) / opacity:0.85
顶部 row: sparkle SVG 11×11 var(--accent) fill + 'AI · 今日一句' mono caps + 右侧 '15:32' 时间戳
摘要正文: font-serif / font-size:19 / italic / line-height:1.45 / min-height:54
入场: 380ms 延迟后打字机逐字 (每字 36-66ms 随机) + caret 闪
prefers-reduced-motion 时跳过打字机直接显示全文
无摘要时 placeholder: '今天还没攒够话，再记一条试试'
is_stale=true 时摘要右侧加 '重新生成' 小链接
a11y: <blockquote aria-live='polite'>
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Memo Card (内容优先 + 左滑揭示动作)
userStories.description: As a user, I want memo cards to show only content (time + body + photo) and reveal Share/More by swiping left.
acceptanceCriteria: 卡面规格: radius:18 / background:var(--surface-white) / border:0.5px solid var(--border-subtle) / shadow:var(--shadow-card) / overflow:hidden
卡面内容: 照片 aspect-ratio 4:5 (radius:0) + body block (padding 16/18 20 18/20)
body 顶部: mono 时间 '15·23' + (mixed 时) 3×3 圆点 + 相机 icon — 不显示地点/天气/kind/分享按钮
body 正文: font-size:16 / line-height:1.62 / text-wrap:pretty / letter-spacing:0.1; 超过 5 行 -webkit-line-clamp:5
左滑手势: REVEAL_WIDTH=132; 阈值 -66 snap 到 -132 否则回 0; 右滑 rubber-band tx*0.18; 左滑过界 -164 rubber-band
完整公式见 PRD §22 Appendix A.1 (web/src/lib/gestures/rubberBand.ts)
松手 transition transform 280ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); 拖动中 transition none
drag.moved > 6px 不触发点击; tx!==0 时第一次点击关闭抽屉
Action drawer 右侧 width:132; MORE sunken / SHARE accent
iOS: DragGesture(minimumDistance:4) + spring(response:0.32, dampingFraction:0.78) + light haptic at snap
键盘可达 (Web): tabIndex=0 / Enter 进详情
Unit tests: rubber-band 公式 5 个边界值 (0/-66/-132/-164/-200)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Wave B-2 核心 story，手势库 0 依赖

userStories.title: 「再记一条解锁今日成稿」placeholder 卡 + unlock_threshold setting

acceptanceCriteria: users.settings jsonb 增加 unlock_threshold key (默认 3); 读取时若不存在则用 3
容器: padding:18 / radius:18 / background:transparent / border:1.5px dashed var(--accent-border)
左侧 36×36 圆形 sparkle icon (背景 var(--accent-soft), icon var(--accent))
文案: mono caps '再记一条解锁今日成稿' + 副标 'AI 将把今天的碎片连缀成一篇日页'
满足阈值后 fade-out 280ms + '今日已解锁' banner
点击占位卡 → focus 到 composer pill mic 按钮

userStories.title: 本周 Wiki 垂直 Spine Feed + /api/today/week-feed endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a vertical museum-caption style feed under '本周' so I can scroll through recent days uninterrupted.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 GET /api/today/week-feed?limit=7 endpoint, 返回 {items:[{id, date_slug, day, date_display, title, lede, tags, word_count, memo_count}]}
容器 padding 12 22 14; spine: position:absolute / left:86 / top:18 / bottom:18 / width:0.5 / background:var(--border-subtle)
每条 entry: grid-template-columns:'52px 1fr' / column-gap:24 / 上下 padding 30 (首条 paddingTop:0)
左列日期 tag 右对齐: mono 'WED' (9.5/700/1.8) + display '05·27' (14/600)
Spine dot: accent 7×7 圆 + 4px var(--bg-warm) halo (box-shadow)，定位 entry 顶部 10pt
右列: serif h3 (21/1.26/-0.4) + lede (14.5/1.7/opacity 0.86) + footer 标签行
Footer: mono caps tags 用 · 分隔 + 右对齐 '412 WORDS'
末尾 terminus: 7×7 hollow 圆 (border 0.5px var(--border-default) / background var(--bg-warm))
无卡片外壳 / 无圆角 box / 无按钮
整条 entry 点击进 /wiki/[date-slug]
空态: '本周还未成稿 — 多记几条今日会自动生成'
Lede -webkit-line-clamp:3
a11y: <article> 语义 + spine/dot aria-hidden
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Memo Detail 顶栏 (sticky glass + 时间锚点)

userStories.title: Memo Detail Hero Photo + caption + lightbox
userStories.description: As a user, I want a large hero photo with mono caption and a TAP TO EXPAND lightbox.
acceptanceCriteria: 图片 aspect-ratio 4:5 / radius:18 / fade-in 280ms
caption 左 mono: '{IMG_filename} · {width} × {height}' (9.5/1.2 letter-spacing/600/var(--fg-subtle))
caption 右: accent mono 'TAP TO EXPAND' + corner-out icon
lightbox: iOS .fullScreenCover + 双指缩放 + 双击重置; Web <dialog> + transform:scale
lightbox 关闭: iOS 下滑 ≥ 80pt rubber-band; Web ESC 或点遮罩

失败: 占位 '图片加载失败' + 重试 link
loading='lazy' (Web) / prefersDecodingAsync (iOS)
alt={memo.body || '相片'}

userStories.title: Memo Detail Body 段落 + 链接/hashtag/mention 识别

hashtag #xxx 渲染 accent 色 (无下划线)，点击跳 /wiki/tag/{tag}
mention @xxx 同 hashtag，点击跳对应 entity
仅识别 http:// / https://，剥离 javascript:/data: 协议

Place chip: position:absolute / left:14 / bottom:14 / padding:7 11 / radius:10 / background:rgba(250,248,246,0.92) / backdrop-filter:blur(10px) / border 0.5
Chip 内容: pin SVG accent + 地点名 (body 12.5/600) + mono caps '{LOCATION} · {COUNTRY}'
底部按钮: paper-plane icon + '在 Apple 地图中打开' + corner-out icon, accent 色
跳转: iOS MKMapItem.openInMaps; Web https://maps.apple.com/?ll={lat},{lng}&q={place} 新窗口
无 location 时整卡不渲染
Map 失败 fallback: #F5EDE3 背景 + pin icon 居中

userStories.title: Drawer 热力图 + /api/stats/heatmap endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a 16-week x 7-day heatmap of my memo activity as the drawer's visual hero.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 web/src/app/api/stats/heatmap/route.ts: GET /api/stats/heatmap?weeks=16 返回 {weeks, from, to, cells:[{day, count}], streak}
SQL: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at)::date AS day, count(*)::int FROM memos WHERE user_id=$1 AND created_at >= now() - interval '16 weeks' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
若 memo 总数 > 5000 回退读 users.heatmap_cache_json (jsonb)
容器白卡: radius:14 / border 0.5 / shadow:var(--shadow-card) / padding:14
16 列 × 7 行 grid, 每格 10×10 / radius:2 / gap:3
等级: 0→empty / 1-2→low / 3-5→mid / >=6→high
未来日期 dashed hairline 占位 (border 0.5px dashed var(--border-default) / background transparent)
顶部 5 个月份标签 mono 9 caps; 左侧 Mon/Wed/Fri mono 8 caps
底部 row: LESS ▢▢▢▢▢ MORE 图例 (5 档) + 右侧 accent 胶囊 🔥 {streak} DAYS
Streak 计算见 PRD §22 Appendix A.3
单格 tap 弹 tooltip: '{date} · {count} memos'
触控扩展到 16×16 透明 padding
Web 用 <svg> 单次绘制 (不 React-render 每个 cell)
iOS 用 LazyVGrid
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

每列: padding:14 6 12 / text-align:center / border-left 0.5px (首列无)

WORDS 计算: SUM(char_length(pages.summary)) WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM created_at) = current_year

userStories.title: Drawer Navigate 卡 (今日/成稿/档案/关系图谱)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a 4-row navigate card with icon tiles and counts to jump to today/wiki/archive/graph.
acceptanceCriteria: 卡片: radius:14 / border / overflow:hidden / shadow:var(--shadow-card)
每行 padding:12 14 / gap:14 / 行间 0.5px hairline
Icon tile: 30×30 / radius:9 / var(--surface-sunken) / border 0.5
选中行: background:var(--accent-soft) / icon tile 改 white / label/count 改 accent / 600 weight
关系图谱行 移除 muted 状态 (iOS /graph 已实现)
4 行: 今日 → /today (count = 今日 memo); 成稿 → /wiki (count = pages); 档案 → /archive; 关系图谱 → /graph
点击行后 drawer 自动关闭 (先 navigate 后 close 280ms)

userStories.title: Drawer Recent 列表 + /api/stats/recent endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want a hairline-separated list of 7 most recent pages with date / title / memo count.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 GET /api/stats/recent?limit=7 返回 {items:[{date_slug, day, date_display, title, memo_count, is_today}]}
SQL: SELECT date_slug, title, memo_count FROM pages WHERE user_id=$1 ORDER BY date_slug DESC LIMIT 7
每行: padding:13 0 / gap:14 / border-top 0.5px (首行无)
左日期 col min-width:52, mono day (9/1.4) + display date (16/600)
中标题: body 14 / 1.4 / 单行 ellipsis
右计数 mono: 10 / 0.6 letter-spacing / color:var(--fg-subtle)
active 状态: date 改 accent / title 改 primary / count 改 accent
VIEW ALL › 点击 → /archive
空态: '还没有成稿的日页'

userStories.title: Composer Pill (底部浮动 + glass)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a floating glassmorphism pill at the bottom with +/mic/Aa buttons to capture memos quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: 容器: position:absolute / bottom:26 (safe-area-inset-bottom) / display:flex / justify-content:center
Pill: padding:6 / radius:999 / background:rgba(255,253,250,0.82) / backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(160%) / border 0.5px rgba(214,206,192,0.5)
shadow 多层: inset highlight + 外 drop shadow (见 PRD §6.7 --shadow-composer)
左 [ + ]: 48×48 圆透明 / aria-label='添加附件'
中 [ 🎙️ ]: 64×56 / radius:999 / background:linear-gradient(180deg, #7a3f00, #5D3000) + 外圈 breathe 1.6s halo
右 [ Aa ]: 48×48 圆透明 / aria-label='键盘输入'
下方一行 mono caps 提示: '长按录音 · 轻点切换'
录音中 pill 整体 pointer-events:none / opacity:0
入场: scale-in 240ms ease-out
Desktop (Web ≥ 768px): pill 改为左下角固定

userStories.title: Composer Pill 长按录音手势 + 权限处理
userStories.description: As a user, I want a 220ms long-press on the mic to start recording, with haptic feedback and mic permission flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Web: onPointerDown 启动 220ms timer; onPointerUp/Leave/Cancel 清 timer + pressed=false; timer 触发时 if pressed 才 onMicLongPressStart()
iOS: DragGesture(minimumDistance:0) + 220ms Task.sleep + UIImpactFeedbackGenerator(.medium).impactOccurred()
Tap (<220ms 松手): 触发 onMic() 切到键盘输入 + UISelectionFeedbackGenerator().selectionChanged()
LongPress (≥220ms): 触发 onMicLongPressStart() 进录音
拖出按钮范围 (pointerleave) 取消录音意图
首次长按 mic 权限未授予 → 系统授权请求; 拒绝后 toast '需要麦克风权限才能录音 · 去设置'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Attach Sheet (4 件套 bottom-up modal)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a bottom sheet with 4 buttons (camera/album/location/file) when I tap the + button.
acceptanceCriteria: Backdrop: position:absolute / inset:0 / background:rgba(30,24,18,0.32) / backdrop-filter:blur(2px) / z-index:60 / animation:fade-in 200ms ease-out
Sheet: left:14 / right:14 / bottom:110 / z-index:65 / radius:28 / padding:20 18 22 / background:rgba(255,253,250,0.92) / backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(160%) / border 0.5
入场: sheet-up 280ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1)
顶部 handle bar: 36×4 #D6CEC0
4 button: 56×56 圆角 18 sunken tile + 12 body label
拍照/相册: iOS PHPicker/UIImagePicker; Web <input type=file accept='image/*' capture='environment'>
位置: iOS LocationService.lastFix; Web navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition({enableHighAccuracy:true, timeout:6000})
附件: 原生 doc picker / Web file input
下滑关闭手势: drag handle ≥ 80px + rubber-band 阻尼 0.18 + spring 返弹
backdrop tap 关闭; ESC 关闭 (Web); focus trap + role='dialog'

userStories.title: Recording Sheet (深色 + 实时波形 + 转写)
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dark sheet during recording with a live waveform, MM:SS timer, and live transcript preview.
acceptanceCriteria: 容器: bottom:0 / paddingBottom:34 / z-index:55 / margin:0 14 / radius:34 / padding:22 22 24 / background:rgba(45,30,12,0.92) / backdrop-filter:blur(28px) saturate(160%)
入场: sheet-up 320ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1)
Header row: 左 🔴 录音中 (10×10 圆 background:#E36B4A + pulse-dot 1.2s + box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(227,107,74,0.18)) + 右 mono 28px MM:SS
Waveform: 64 bars, rAF 60fps, useWaveform hook (公式见 PRD §22 Appendix A.2)
每 bar width:2 / gap:2 / height:max(2,h) / transition height 80ms
实时转写预览: body 13 / color:rgba(245,237,227,0.65) / 末尾 caret 闪
双按钮: 取消 (flex:1, background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1) / #F5EDE3 文字) + 停止并转写 (flex:1.6, background:#F5EDE3 / #2B2822 + 勾 icon)
取消: discard buffer + 关闭
停止并转写: VoiceService.transcribe() → 新 memo 草稿 + banner '已添加 1 条 memo'
iOS: AVAudioRecorder + AVAudioEngine installTap 实时 RMS 喂波形
Web: AudioContext.createAnalyser() + getByteFrequencyData
5 分钟自动停止 + alert '录音已达上限'
失焦保持 30s 后自动停止保存
实时转写: iOS SFSpeechRecognizer (zh-CN); Web Whisper API streaming
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 灵动岛 Live Activity (iOS 16.1+ ActivityKit)

ActivityKit: 注册 / 更新 / 结束 Live Activity
Island compact: 左红点 + 右 3-bar waveform
Island expanded: 左 '🔴 MM:SS' + 右 18-bar waveform + 底部 '停止' 按钮
Island minimal: 单红点
BackgroundTasks 每 1s update
5min 上限后 end Live Activity
Web (装饰): iPhone frame 顶部 248×37 / radius:24 / black 胶囊
展开 248 / 收起 126, transition width 360ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1)
内容左: 8×8 red dot pulse-dot 1.2s + mono 11 计时
内容右: 18 高 mini waveform (18 bars, width:1.6 / gap:1.5)
点击灵动岛 deep link 回到 Today + RecordingSheet (widgetURL)

userStories.title: Share Card 5 个模板视觉
userStories.description: As a user, I want 5 distinct share templates (minimal/film/polaroid/journal/postcard) to choose from.
acceptanceCriteria: minimal: 白底 + serif 大字标题 + 正文 + 小 mono 落款 (日期 + 地点)
film: 黑边白卡夹相片 + 底部胶卷孔装饰 (SVG repeat) + 帧号 mono '28 / 36A'
polaroid: 白边大相片 + 底部手写体 caption (Caveat Google font 已在 US-001 加入)
journal: 暖米色纸纹背景 + 图钉/胶带装饰 SVG + 手写感 serif 标题
postcard: 左右二分 (左相片 + 右纵向 mono 邮戳 + serif 中段感言)
所有模板支持切换字体 (serif/sans) 与配色 (暖/冷) + 状态持久化
长正文自动 truncate: minimal 8 行 / film 6 行 / polaroid 2 行 / journal 10 行 / postcard 5 行
组件位于 web/src/components/share/{templateId}.tsx + DayPage/Features/Share/Templates/{templateId}.swift
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Share Card 导出 PNG + /api/img proxy
userStories.description: As a user, tapping download exports the current template as a 1080×1350 PNG.
acceptanceCriteria: iOS: ImageRenderer API 渲染 SwiftUI 视图为 UIImage (需 NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription) + 保存 Photos 或 UIActivityViewController
Web: html-to-image@^1.11 导出 1080×1350 PNG + <a download> 触发
新建 GET /api/img/{memo_id} same-origin proxy (跨域照片 CORS-safe)，user 必须 own memo
导出过程 spinner + 完成 toast '已保存到 {Photos/Downloads}'
字体加载完毕: await document.fonts.ready
失败 toast '导出失败，请重试'
性能预算: Web ≤ 1.5s / iOS ≤ 0.8s
上报 analytics: share_card_exported event {template, kind, has_photo, duration_ms}
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
